title: limeum telephioides var. telephioides
intro: Limeum telephioides var. telephioides, also known as Limeum, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Limeum genus. The Limeum plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Limeum include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Limeum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine practices.
